titleStmt.title: SII 25.97: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 97. (A.R. No. 97 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

This record begins with the meykirti Tirumaḍandaiyum-Jayamaḍandaiyum, etc., of the Pāṉdya king Śrīvallabha. It mentions the mūlaparushai of Tiruppattūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu and registers the gift of 11 kañañju, six mañjāḍi of gold to meet the expenses for raising the garden (tirunandavaṉam) and for the tirumugai and tiruppaḷḷittāmam to the dūty Śrītaḷiparamēśvarar by Tañjāvūrkiḻavaṉ Vaḍugaṉ-uyyavandāṉ, a merchant of Aruviyūr alias Dēśi Uyyavandapaṭṭaṇam in the above nāḍu. The sempoṉ-kāśu deposited in the treasury was weighed by the measure called kūttāḍi. The garden raised was named Toṇḍiyūraṉ-Uyyavandāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī tirumaṭantaiyuñ jayamaṭantaiyun tirupuyaṅkaṉiliṉi tiruppa Irunilamum perumaiyeyta Eṇṭicaiyuṅ kuṭainiyaṟṟa maṉṉavarellām vantiṟaiñ māvil
talavaru maṇimuṭi cūṭit teṉkumariyum vaṭakaṅkaiyun tiraikkaṭale Ellaiyākap pār muḻutuṅkayalāṇaipāntu ceṅkolluṭaṉ varai manniya vīrasiṅkāsaṉattu mukko kiḻānaṭikaḷo
ṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmutal matirkulam viḷakkiya komutal koccaṭaiya paṟmarāṉa tripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ [śrīval]lavadevarkku yāṇṭu 10 7 Āvatu keraḷaciṅka vaḷanāṭṭu branma(hma)
deyan tirupputtūr mūlaparuṣaiyom Innāṭṭu Aruviyūrāṉa teciuyyavantāṉ vaṭukaṉ Uyyavantāṉ Ivvūr śrītaḷiparameśvararkku Ittevar te
vatānam paṭaiyāṇivāykkāl teṟkil cerivayakkal kīḻet toṇṭiyūraṉ Uyyavantāneṉṉun tirunantavāṉam tirumukait tiruppaḷḷittāmam Ākkutaṟkuc cantirātittavaṟ Ittevar śrīpa
ṇṭarattuk kūttāṭiyāl nāḷ 1 kku viṭakkaṭava Ipaṇam puṭavai mutalukku Ōrāṇṭukkuk kācu- 1m celuttuvatāka śrīpaṇṭārattu Ivaṉ Oṭukkiṉa cempoṉkācu kallāl patinoru kaḻañ
ce Āṟumañcāṭiyum śrīpaṇṭārattile Oṭukkuvittuk koṇṭu Iṉta vastuvukku Iṉnelumayyañ celuttuvomāka kalveṭṭuvittukkuṭutto mūlaparuṣaiyom Itu [can=tirase]
kharara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 25.97 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
